subcodes.first_line: O ye illumined friends of Abdu'l-Baha: It is well-nigh three years since, like unto the wind I have been crossing vast deserts and like unto the nestless and shelterless bird
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران نورانی عبدالبهاء سه سال است که در بادیه های وسیع مانند باد بادیه
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
